steps.t: Stanric's house is near the Mead Hall in Stangard. You should investigate Stanric's house, and do your best to keep beneath the notice of the resident…
Something glints on the floor of Stanric's house in Stangard. You should investigate the glinting object more closely.
Cynred is at the lock-house in Stangard. You should find Cynred and ask him why his jail keys are in Stanric's home.
According to Cynred, Stanric is down below in the lock-house. You should find Stanric at once.
